# PERF-132 positive: go func() that does I/O but the closure can't be cancelled
lang: go
file: PERF-132-vulnerable.go
variant: stdlib
---
package sample

import (
	"context"
	"database/sql"
	"net/http"
)

func Handle(ctx context.Context, r *http.Request, db *sql.DB) {
	_ = r
	_ = ctx
	_ = db
	go func() {
		// Goroutine has no ctx parameter; the parent's
		// cancellation does not propagate because the goroutine
		// keeps running until db.Query completes.
		rows, _ := db.Query("SELECT id FROM users")
		_ = rows
	}()
}
